title: Out of Sambalpur? Send your reports.
lead: If you live elsewhere in Odisha — or anywhere we can't see you in person — WhatsApp Dr. Shristi with a photo of your reports and a brief note. He writes back within 24 hours with a sense of whether you need a visit, more tests, or just a follow-up call.

what_we_handle.name: First review of reports
what_we_handle.body: Send your blood, urine, BP records, and any prior imaging. You'll get a plain-language read-back and a recommendation.

what_we_handle.name: Follow-up between visits
what_we_handle.body: Once you're under our care, routine follow-ups — new lab results, medication adjustments, BP/sugar tracking — work over WhatsApp.

what_we_handle.name: Second opinions
what_we_handle.body: Send what you've been told and the reports it's based on. Dr. Shristi reads them carefully before responding.

what_we_handle.name: Coordination with your local doctor
what_we_handle.body: We're happy to coordinate with your local physician — share the contact and we'll reach out.
